message:
fix(search): require lexical evidence in hybrid mode and add search preset resolution

Hybrid search was falling back to a global priority listing when queries
had no lexical matches, defeating the purpose of a search. Now both
text and hybrid modes filter out results with zero boosted text score,
ensuring search results always have lexical relevance to the query.

- search.rs: move the zero-score filter from text-mode-only to after
  the lexical boost calculation so hybrid mode also requires lexical
  evidence; add hybrid_search_without_lexical_match_returns_no_results test
- cli.rs: add resolve_search_preset() with BV_SEARCH_PRESET env var
  fallback; add resolve_optional_string_choice helper with tests for
  env fallback, CLI precedence, and blank value rejection
- main.rs: wire search preset resolution into main dispatch
- e2e_robot_matrix.rs: add E2E scenarios for new search preset behavior
- Clean up rotated beads .br_history files and update issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
